def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not (0x064B <= ord(ch) <= 0x065F or 0x0610 <= ord(ch) <= 0x061A or 0x06D6 <= ord(ch) <= 0x06DC or 0x06DF <= ord(ch) <= 0x06ED))
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # normalize alif/hamza
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # normalize ya and alif maqsura
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # normalize taa marbuta to ha
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # normalize hamza to bare: map ؤ to و? and ئ to ي? We'll map to hamza standalone
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters/digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

test = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
print(test)
print(normalize_arabic(test))
